body:
Hey Amara,

Hope you're having a good week — I wanted to loop back on the conversation we started at the [Threshold Ventures](threshold-ventures) offsite last month about potentially co-leading the next round for [Solace Grid](companies/solace-grid). I've been doing more diligence on their demand-response platform and I think the thesis holds up really well, especially given where utility procurement cycles are heading into 2026. Would love to get on a call this week or next to align on valuation expectations before we go back to the founders. Let me know what your calendar looks like.

— Mina
